page.title: Template:Country data Transitional Islamic State of Afghanistan

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Transitional Islamic State of Afghanistan]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Transitional Islamic State of Afghanistan]]</includeonly>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Transitional Islamic State of Afghanistan | shortname alias = Afghanistan | flag alias = Flag of Afghanistan (2004-2013).svg | flag alias-2002 = Flag of Afghanistan (2002-2004).svg | flag alias-2003 = Flag of Afghanistan (2002–2004, variant with golden arms).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 2002 | var2 = 2003 | related1 = Afghanistan | related2 = Emirate of Afghanistan | related3 = Kingdom of Afghanistan | related4 = Emirate of Afghanistan (1929) | related5 = Republic of Afghanistan (1973–1978) | related6 = Democratic Republic of Afghanistan | related7 = Republic of Afghanistan (1987–1992) | related8 = Islamic State of Afghanistan | related9 = Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (1996–2001) | related10 = Islamic Republic of Afghanistan | related11 = Taliban | cat = Afghanistan, Transitional Islamic State </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
